quick_skim.title: Towards Personalized Differentially Private Learning for Decentralized Local Graphs
quick_skim.abstract: Graph-structured data is increasingly generated and stored in decentralized environments, such as social platforms, mobile applications, and edge networks, where users maintain control over their local graph data. However, collecting and analyzing such decentralized graph data for downstream learning tasks raises significant privacy concerns, as nodes and their attributes often contain sensitive personal information. Local Differential Privacy (LDP) has emerged as a promising solution for privacy-preserving data collection without relying on trusted servers. Nevertheless, existing LDP-based graph learning methods typically assume uniform privacy requirements across users, ignoring the heterogeneous and personalized privacy preferences commonly observed in real-world systems. This uniform treatment leads to inflexible noise injection at the data collection stage, resulting in substantial distortion of graph data and degraded utility in subsequent analysis. To address this limitation, we propose PPGNN, a personalized differentially private framework for decentralized graph data. PPGNN enables user-specific privacy budgets during local perturbation while preserving analytical utility. To handle heterogeneous privacy levels and noise distortion, we design a two-stage solution consisting of a Personalized Perturbation Mechanism (PPM) and a weighted calibration strategy, FlexProp. Extensive experiments on six real-world graph datasets demonstrate that PPGNN effectively balances personalized privacy protection and data utility in decentralized graph learning scenarios.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: decentralized local graph learning for distributed training
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 去中心化局部图学习，适用于分布式训练
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 去中心化局部图学习，适用于分布式训练
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 去中心化局部图学习，适用于分布式训练
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a personalized differential privacy framework for decentralized graph learning, addressing heterogeneous privacy preferences while enabling communication-efficient distributed learning on local graphs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对去中心化图中的隐私问题，提出个性化差分隐私学习框架。通过考虑用户异质的隐私偏好，在保护敏感信息的同时实现高效的分布式图学习。实验表明该框架在隐私保护与模型效用之间取得了良好平衡，为分布式GNN训练中的隐私保障提供了新方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对去中心化图中的隐私问题，提出个性化差分隐私学习框架。通过考虑用户异质的隐私偏好，在保护敏感信息的同时实现高效的分布式图学习。实验表明该框架在隐私保护与模型效用之间取得了良好平衡，为分布式GNN训练中的隐私保障提供了新方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: distributed training systems for graph neural networks

quick_skim.title: Learning Adaptive Solvers for Distributed Factor Graph Optimization on Matrix Lie Groups
quick_skim.abstract: Modern robotic perception increasingly involves large-scale geometric optimization problems distributed across multiple robots or sessions. However, existing distributed solvers often depend on brittle hand tuning and primarily target rigid body pose graphs. To address this, we present DeepCORD, a learning-augmented framework for distributed factor graph optimization on general matrix Lie groups. By unfolding a parallel and accelerated Riemannian optimizer into differentiable iterations, DeepCORD learns a self-supervised feedback policy that dynamically adapts solver parameters according to the optimization phase and communication status. The resulting method enables adaptive distributed optimization over matrix Lie groups under both synchronous and asynchronous communication regimes. Extensive experiments on real-world $\mathrm{SE}$(3) pose graph optimization and $\mathrm{SL}$(4) projective submap alignment show that our method achieves lower objective values than existing distributed baselines on most benchmarks across realistic operating scenarios.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: distributed factor graph optimization with adaptive communication-aware solver
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 分布式因子图优化，具有自适应通信感知求解器
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 分布式因子图优化，具有自适应通信感知求解器
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 分布式因子图优化，具有自适应通信感知求解器
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DeepCORD learns a self-supervised feedback policy to dynamically adapt distributed solver parameters based on optimization phase and communication status, enabling adaptive distributed optimization on matrix Lie groups.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现代机器人感知中常涉及多机器人或会话间的大规模几何优化问题，但现有分布式求解器依赖于人工调参。DeepCORD通过展开并行加速的黎曼优化器为可微迭代，学习自监督反馈策略，动态适应优化阶段和通信状态，实现了矩阵李群上的自适应分布式优化。该方法为分布式图优化提供了一种学习型求解方案，对分布式GNN训练具有借鉴意义。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现代机器人感知中常涉及多机器人或会话间的大规模几何优化问题，但现有分布式求解器依赖于人工调参。DeepCORD通过展开并行加速的黎曼优化器为可微迭代，学习自监督反馈策略，动态适应优化阶段和通信状态，实现了矩阵李群上的自适应分布式优化。该方法为分布式图优化提供了一种学习型求解方案，对分布式GNN训练具有借鉴意义。
